name: bigquery-duckdb
description: Query Google BigQuery and ingest into DuckDB

project_id.title: Project ID
project_id.description: Google Cloud project ID to use for queries
project_id.x-hint: If empty, Rill will use the project ID from your credentials when available.

sql.title: SQL
sql.description: SQL query to run against your warehouse

files.name: connector
files.code_template:
# Connector YAML
# Reference documentation: [[ .docs_url ]]
type: connector
driver: bigquery
[[ renderProps .config_props ]]

files.name: model
files.code_template:
# Model YAML
# Reference documentation: https://docs.rilldata.com/developers/build/connectors/data-source/bigquery
type: model
[[ if .connector_name -]]
connector: "[[ .connector_name ]]"
[[ end -]]
materialize: true
[[ if .sql -]]
sql: |
  [[ .sql | indent 2 ]]

dev:
  sql: |
    [[ .sql ]] limit 10000
[[ end -]]
